# iproute_tcp_metrics (Resource)

Manages TCP metrics cache entries (ip tcp_metrics).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# TCP metrics cache entry
# Note: TCP metrics entries are typically created by the kernel via
# actual TCP connections. This resource manages existing cache entries.
resource "iproute_tcp_metrics" "example" {
  address = "10.0.0.1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) Destination address.

### Read-Only

- `cwnd` (Number) Congestion window.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `rtt` (Number) RTT (microseconds).
- `rttvar` (Number) RTT variance.
- `ssthresh` (Number) Slow start threshold.
